title: How a man of God builds a life he doesn't have to hide
caption:
A godly man looks the same in the dark.

No church version. No gym version. No private browser version. If those are three different people, none of them are real.

The work isn't to perform better in public. It's to narrow the gap between who you are privately and who you say you are. That gap is exactly where God does His best forming work.

You don't need to be a different man before you bring it into the light. You bring it as the man you are — and you start to change from there. "Everything exposed by the light becomes visible." — Ephesians 5:13.

He sees the private tab. He sees the version of you that shows up after midnight. He's not shocked by it. And He's not finished with it either. That's not a threat. It's actually the most freeing thing about all of it.

A man who lives like that builds something he can stand behind.

Save this for the week the gap feels too wide.

#faith #integrity #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #thework #discipline #christianity #scripture
